zh.Shotley, Babergh, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可紹特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Fiske於1455年出生在英國素福爾可紹特利時，她的父親Edmund Fiske28歲，母親Elizabeth Margery Simon14歲。她於1476年與George Stratton Sr在英國素福爾可紹特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年在她的家鄉享年104歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可紹特利。

zh-hans.Shotley, Babergh, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可紹特利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Fiske于1455年出生在英国素福爾可紹特利时，她的父亲Edmund Fiske28岁，母亲Elizabeth Margery Simon14岁。她于1476年与George Stratton Sr在英国素福爾可紹特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年在她的家乡享年104岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可紹特利。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Fiske was born in 1455, in Shotley, Suffolk, England, her father, Edmund Fiske, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Margery Simon, was 14. She married George Stratton Sr in 1476, in Shotley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1559, in her hometown, at the age of 104, and was buried in Shotley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Fiske est née en 1455, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Fiske, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Margery Simon, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé George Stratton Sr en 1476, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1559, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 104 ans, et a été enterrée à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Fiske 1455 in Shotley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Fiske 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Margery Simon 14. Sie hat 1476 in Shotley, Suffolk, England George Stratton Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1559 im Alter von 104 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Shotley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fiske è nata il nel 1455 nel Shotley, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Edmund Fiske, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Margery Simon, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato George Stratton Sr nel 1476, nel Shotley, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1559, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 104 anni, e fu sepolta a Shotley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fiskeが1455年にイギリススフォルクショトリーで生まれた時，父Edmund Fiskeは28歳，母Elizabeth Margery Simonは14歳であった。1476年にイギリススフォルクショトリーでGeorge Stratton Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年に故郷で104歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクショトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fiske(이)가 1455년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Fiske(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Margery Simon(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 George Stratton Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 그녀의 고향에서 104세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.1480: de 10 de janeiro de 1480 a 9 de janeiro de 1481
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fiske nasceu em 1455, em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Fiske, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Margery Simon, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com George Stratton Sr em 1476, em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1559, em sua cidade natal, com 104 anos, e foi sepultada em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Fiske родилась в 1455 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Fiske было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Margery Simon, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Stratton Sr в 1476 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1559 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 104 лет и была похоронена в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con George Stratton Sr en 1476, en Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1559, en su pueblo, a la edad de 104 años, y fue sepultada en Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
